# Runes
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Runes&prop=wikitext

In ROTF you can equip runes in your character, allowing each of your classes to have an unique build

== Usage ==
[[File:Runes.png|thumb|142x142px]]To equip your runes, you need to first obtain them, and then speak with the Rune Master found in the nexus or in your vault.
Once you speak with him, you will see your runes tree. 

First you need to unlock the slots in the skill tree through the following methods:

-Line 2: Reach 800 base fame with a character

-Line 3: Use your first galactic essence

-Line 4: Reach 82 skill points with a character

In the 1st slot you can equip a might rune (orange) in the 2nd one, a resolve rune (green), in the 3rd one an utility rune (blue) and in the 4th one whichever you want. You can equip minirunes freely in any of the small slots.

To equip a rune just click on the slot you want to place the rune in, and then the rune you want to equip. Then Save.

<gallery>
RunesTreeEmpty.png|Empty runes tree
RunesTreeFull.png|Complete runes tree

</gallery>
== Obtention ==

To obtain runes you need to loot Nodestones, which are dropped by galaxy bosses, elite gods and dungeon bosses.

Half of the runes (9 big, 3 small) drop in galaxy nodestones, the others (9 big, 5 small) drop in normal ones, making a total of 26 runes.

== Other Data ==
-Each character keeps their own set of runes.

-Runes are kept for ever once you unlock them and are shared between all your characters.

-You can use this UNOFFICIAL website to plan your build https://rotfskilltree.ddns.net/ (this site is not affiliated to ROTF, anything that happens in this webstie is not related and will not be attended by admins)<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Runes</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Might Runes</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ManaHungerRune.png
| link = Mana Hunger
| text = Mana Hunger
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = PerfectionistRune.png
| link = Perfectionist
| text = Perfectionist
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = NarrowSightedMagicRune.png
| link = Narrow Sighted Magic
| text = Narrow Sighted Magic
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ConsistentOnslaughtRune.png
| link = Consistent Onslaught
| text = Consistent Onslaught
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AdrenalineRushRune.png
| link = Adrenaline Rush
| text = Adrenaline Rush
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AggressiveAgitatorRune.png
| link = Aggressive Agitator
| text = Aggressive Agitator
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Resolve Runes</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BlissfulIgnoranceRune.png
| link = Blissful Ignorance
| text = Blissful Ignorance
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = BloodPactRune.png
| link = Blood Pact
| text = Blood Pact
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BulwarkOfTheSurgeonRune.png
| link = Bulwark Of The Surgeon
| text = Bulwark Of The Surgeon
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RegenerationOfTheBruteRune.png
| link = Regeneration Of The Brute
| text = Regeneration Of The Brute
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = BidingTimeRune.png
| link = Biding Time
| text = Biding Time
}}
|{{Image
| file = ArcaneSurgeRune.png
| link = Arcane Surge
| text = Arcane Surge
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Utility runes</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = EyeForAnEyeRune.png
| link = Eye For An Eye
| text = Eye For An Eye
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RestorationTemptationRune.png
| link = Restoration Temptation
| text = Restoration Temptation
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DreadstumpGreedRune.png
| link = Dreadstump's Greed
| text = Dreadstump's Greed
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RareObsessionRune.png
| link = Rare Obsession
| text = Rare Obsession
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = PotHeadRune.png
| link = Pot Head
| text = Pot Head
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = SoloThiefRune.png
| link = Solo Thief
| text = Solo Thief
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Mini runes</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MiniEnlightenmentRune.png
| link = Mini Enlightenment
| text = Mini Enlightenment
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MiniSpiritRune.png
| link = Mini Spirit
| text = Mini Spirit
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MiniProtectionRune.png
| link = Mini Protection
| text = Mini Protection
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MiniPrecisionRune.png
| link = Mini Precision
| text = Mini Precision
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MiniStrengthRune.png
| link = Mini Strength
| text = Mini Strength
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MiniMobilityRune.png
| link = Mini Mobility
| text = Mini Mobility
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MiniHealthRune.png
| link = Mini Health
| text = Mini Health
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MiniMagicRune.png
| link = Mini Magic
| text = Mini Magic
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
